description_long: This is a vintage-style round alarm clock with a distressed teal metal body and a classic analog face. The front features a glass-covered dial with black Roman numerals and ornate black clock hands, surrounded by a decorative beaded rim. At the top, a brass-colored metal handle arches between two spherical finials, and a winding knob sits at the center. The back reveals two wind-up keys and a bell hammer mechanism, indicating a mechanical movement. The clock stands on two small, curved metal feet, giving it stability and a slightly elevated profile. Subtle wear and patina on the paint and metal details add to its antique character.
description: A vintage teal metal alarm clock with a round face, Roman numerals, and a brass handle, featuring visible wind-up keys and a distressed finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the clock face with Roman numerals, ornate hands, and decorative rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved teal metal body, brass handle, and one of the small metal feet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wind-up keys, bell hammer, and textured back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth teal body, brass handle, and the other metal foot.
attribute_face_design: Round face with black Roman numerals, ornate black hands, and a decorative beaded rim, covered by clear glass.
